entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`subject` TEXT NOT NULL, `predicate` TEXT NOT NULL, `objectValue` TEXT NOT NULL, `evidenceQuote` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`memory_atoms`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_memory_atoms_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `memory_atoms` BEGIN DELETE FROM `memory_atoms_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_memory_atoms_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `memory_atoms` BEGIN DELETE FROM `memory_atoms_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_memory_atoms_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `memory_atoms` BEGIN INSERT INTO `memory_atoms_fts`(`docid`, `subject`, `predicate`, `objectValue`, `evidenceQuote`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`subject`, NEW.`predicate`, NEW.`objectValue`, NEW.`evidenceQuote`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_memory_atoms_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `memory_atoms` BEGIN INSERT INTO `memory_atoms_fts`(`docid`, `subject`, `predicate`, `objectValue`, `evidenceQuote`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`subject`, NEW.`predicate`, NEW.`objectValue`, NEW.`evidenceQuote`); END
